THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERT.description: Overexertion deals damage to you if you fail to block all damage this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED.title: Bleed
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED.description: Bleeding creatures lose HP every time Bleed is applied. Each turn, Bleed is reduced by 1.
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR.title: Armor
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR.description: Armor lowers damage taken from all attacks, before Block.
